rawAssistant: "Welcome back to Hollowfen! I see you're geared up for a journey, and with that travel cloak of yours, you look like you're ready for whatever the roads bring. Why not take a moment to restock on some healing supplies before you head out? My bench is fully stocked tonight – Cold Salve, Antidote, Shock Tonic are all available."
